chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4456 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.8194/2017 3. For orders on CMA No.8195/2017 4. For hearing of main case 08-04-2025 None present.. This petition is pending since 2017 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
